title: remove_member called for users never in the MLS group generates misleading warn
description: UserLeft handler calls mls.remove_member(&pub_id) whenever i_am_admin && mls_active, without checking mls.group_contains(&pub_id) first. A user who disconnects before the admin has added them (race: UserLeft arrives before KeyPackageResponse) causes remove_member to fail with 'member not in group', logged at warn! level. In any session where users join and leave quickly, this warn fires routinely. A future maintainer chasing this log entry will waste time on a normal code path — the check should mirror the guard already used in KeyPackageReady.
